---
title: "Language Acquisition"
---
| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| 10/29 | Typical development |  Newport & Getz (2025) |
| 11/3 | Language deprivation | Ferjan Ramirez et al. (2014) |
| 11/5 | Perinatal stroke | Newport et al. (2022) |
| 11/10 | Bilingualism | Costa & Sebastián-Gallés (2014)
| 11/12 | Bilingualism | Antoniou (2019) 
| 11/17 |  <span class="exam-badge">Exam #3</span> | 


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Language Acquisition
(To be added)

:::
